task_lines: Make them useful for comedy pressure, romantic interference, emotional honesty, and novella pacing.
Treat this as relationship-pressure design, not decorative cast filling.
The cast should actively affect the couple through interference, support, temptation, obligation, humiliation, leverage, or truth-telling.
Aim to cover multiple pressure roles such as a rival or romantic complication, a loyal friend or confidant, a family or work authority figure, and at least one destabilizing wildcard.
Use connection_to_leads and story_function to say exactly how each person changes the couple's path or adds challenge.
Do not repeat the two leads.
Some characters can be lightly sketched, but at least two should be well defined.
Return character planning data, not mini-scenes or narrative prose.
